productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Green Graphic Design Umbrella
description: From a fashion accessory to an all-season necessity, the umbrella has come a long way. This compact umbrella from united colors of benetton has been crafted with absolute waterproof material and unique prints that give you a colourful edge in all seasons!Three-fold umbrella with eight ribs and stretchers made of stainless steelShade and cover made of 100% polyamide for waterproofing and easy storageCap measures 100 cm in diameter when opened upUmbrella measures 24 cm in length when packedGreen and black striped print shade and cover with green and black striped printSturdy stainless steel tube with a runner, top and bottom spring, and an open capBlack rounded plastic tip cup and press button on the umbrella that has the Big Ben logoHaul loop for hanging easeCareWipe dust and dirt with a damp, clean clothHang dry in shade
